SUBJECT: JVs: save the date…
Just a quick heads up… I’ve got an ALL NEW
version of Product Launch Formula coming soon.
This will be PLF 3.0… and it will be an ENTIRELY
new course, with all new (and really cool!)
prelaunch material. This is going to be stuff that
you’re going to love to mail… and your list is
going to love getting.
Prelaunch starts June 10th, and we will open the
cart on June 22nd.
You’ve probably already been through this with me
A few times… so you know that it means HUNDREDS
OF THOUSANDS of dollars in commissions!
My last NINE launches have all done at least a
million dollars, and this launch will make it ten
in a row… and I hope you’ll join me.
I’ll be sending more details soon, but I just
wanted to get those dates on your calendar.
Prelaunch Starts: June 10th
Open Cart: June 22nd
That’s it for now…
best regards,
Jeff
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Case Study Plf 3.0:
Call for Case Studies
Module 3
Call for Case Studies…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

OK, I’m going to collect some new Case Studies for
Product Launch Formula… if you’ve done a
PLF-style launch and would like to be featured in
one of my Case Studies… then I would like to
hear from you.
(I’m going to be releasing an all-new Product
Launch Formula in June… PLF 3.0, and it’s going
to be 100% new from the ground up.)
And since so many people have done great launches
just by studying the free material I publish, I
will even consider people who are not Product
Launch Formula Owners.
IMPORTANT: your launch doesn’t have to be a
huge six or seven-figure launch. Just one that you
would be happy to share… I’ve done a Case Study
of a $2,000.00 launch, and it was great.
If you’re interested in being in a Case Study (and
being interviewed by me), you can apply here:
http://www.sixinseven.com/plf2case.html
That’s it for now...
best regards,
Jeff
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
